query:
CREATE TABLE `points_log` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`action` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`amount` int NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `points_log_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `profiles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`birthday` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`zodiacSign` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	`mainNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`behaviorNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`traitNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`yearNumber` int NOT NULL,
	`digitSum` int NOT NULL,
	`birthDay` int NOT NULL,
	`unlockedSubconscious` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`unlockedYearReport` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `profiles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `referrals` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`inviterId` int NOT NULL,
	`inviteeId` int NOT NULL,
	`inviteCode` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`pointsAwarded` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `referrals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `shares` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`platform` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`shareUrl` text,
	`cardImageUrl` text,
	`clickCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`conversionCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`pointsAwarded` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `shares_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `points` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `inviteCode` varchar(16);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `lastCheckinAt` timestamp;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD CONSTRAINT `users_inviteCode_unique` UNIQUE(`inviteCode`);
